original_prompt: Perform a security audit on test_ash_unit.py, identify potential vulnerabilities, and suggest/apply fixes.

tasks.title: Read full content of test_ash_unit.py
tasks.description: Read the complete contents of scratch/test_ash_unit.py to analyze all test cases and identify security-related issues in test data or logic.

tasks.title: Read send_completion_request function in test_ash.py
tasks.description: Inspect scratch/test_ash.py to understand the actual implementation of send_completion_request, especially how it handles authentication, input validation, and error responses.

tasks.title: Fix hardcoded API key in test setup
tasks.description: Replace the hardcoded 'your-api-key-here' in self.valid_headers with a placeholder like 'Bearer <REDACTED>' and add a comment explaining that real credentials should never be committed. Also ensure no actual secrets appear in test files.

tasks.title: Add input validation test for payload fields
tasks.description: Append a new test method `test_invalid_payload_fields` that verifies the function rejects invalid payload values (e.g., negative max_tokens, out-of-range temperature).

tasks.title: Add test for URL injection vulnerability
tasks.description: Create a test case that attempts to pass a malicious URL (e.g., file:// or javascript:) in base_url and verify the function either sanitizes it or raises an appropriate exception.

tasks.title: Ensure consistent error handling in all test methods
tasks.description: Review and fix any incomplete assertions or missing exception handling in existing tests (e.g., incomplete mock setup in test_http_5xx_error_response).

tasks.title: Run unit tests to verify fixes
tasks.description: Execute `python -m pytest scratch/test_ash_unit.py -v` to confirm all tests pass after applying security improvements.
